resources.string: To disable this restriction, please refer to corresponding setting in PrismSpace.

When PrismSpace is activated, you may see "device is managed by your organization" or similar information around the system UI. It's the standard transparency notice of Android for Work (the underlying Android feature used by PrismSpace), which cannot be removed.

PrismSpace does not upload personal data automatically. Core space-management, install and file-transfer flows run locally; update checks, PrismProbe network tests and diagnostic sharing only run when you choose them.

If you get message "xxx feature disabled by admin", you may have enabled one of the restriction features in PrismSpace, please refer to corresponding setting in PrismSpace.

To uninstall PrismSpace, you must deactivate it first, go to PrismSpace - Settings - Scoped Settings - Destroy / Deactivate.
App Ops was not preserved due to internal error.
